title: 4 Pack Acrylic Qtip Holder Dispenser for Cotton Swabs, Balls, Pads, Floss Picks- Small Clear Plastic Canister Apothecary Jar Set, Bathroom Essentials Accessories Decor, Vanity Makeup Storage Organizer
description:
About this item
Item Includes 12 Pcs - 4 pack clear acrylic qtip holder dispenser with lids (2pcs 12oz & 2pcs 10oz) + 4 clear labels with black pre-printed words (Cotton Balls, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Pads, Floss Picks) + 4 white labels
Ideal Size Storage Containers - These canisters are perfect organizer for small objects, quite easy to store and take out, such as Q-tip, cotton ball, cotton swab, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampon, bath salts, hair tie band, makeup brush, beauty egg, face brush, crayons, candy, pens, clip and more small things
Functional & Beauty In Every Space - These apothecary jars are good decor elements, accessories set for most home decor clearance, such as restroom supplies, bathroom essentials accessories, vanity organizing, bathroom shelves, bedroom, kitchen or office.
Thick Clear Smooth Acrylic - The 4 cute jars and lids are made of thick plastic with smooth edge, be safe and hard not to be broken. Lids 100% fit the jars to keep from dust and easy to open and close
Practical Labels - Our carefully prepared transparent labels are commonly used by most people. You can choose to use them directly or write item names on white labels.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
The 4 Pack Acrylic Qtip Holder Dispenser is a fantastic addition to my bathroom and vanity setup! These small clear plastic canisters are perfect for organizing cotton swabs, balls, pads, and floss picks, providing a sleek and stylish way to keep my essentials easily accessible.

What I love most about these dispensers is their elegant design. The clear acrylic material not only looks great but also allows me to see the contents at a glance, making it easy to know when I need to restock. The minimalist aesthetic fits seamlessly with any bathroom decor, adding a touch of sophistication while keeping things tidy.

Each canister is just the right size for various items, and the secure lids help keep everything clean and dust-free. I've used them to store a variety of essentials, from cotton swabs for makeup touch-ups to pads for skincare routines, and they work perfectly!

The set of four is ideal for creating an organized system in my bathroom or vanity. I appreciate how versatile they are; they can be used for different items in different locations, whether in the bathroom, on my makeup vanity, or even in the kitchen for small tools.

Overall, I highly recommend the 4 Pack Acrylic Qtip Holder Dispenser for anyone looking to elevate their organization game. These dispensers combine style, functionality, and versatility, making them a must-have for keeping your bathroom essentials in order!Daughter loves them- uses for qtips and flossers, but just be aware the diameter on them is smaller than traditional sized dispensers I have seenThese acrylic containers are the perfect size and style for bathroom toiletries. Elevates the look of my bathroom counter while reducing clutter. And they’re so reasonably priced!Play Video
When I unboxed these, they were small and I was concerned they would be too small. I was wrong! These are the perfect size for hair elastics, q tips, cotton rounds and dental picks.

They come in two sizes and nest together. The plastic is sturdy and lightweight. expected the tops to be difficult to open, they are not!

They look great on my vanity and are an easy way to organize everyday items.

Overall, I am pleased with my purchase.Very cute and classy looking. It came with labels which is a plus. Looks like glass but it's plastic. I liked the way it looks in my medicine cabinet. It's not super thick and takes up little space.Got these for my newly remodeled bathroom. Perfect for storage of those little items like floss sticks, q-tips, hair ties, cotton rounds, blenders, and more. These are great quality and easy to see what’s inside. They match any decor since they’re clear.I loveee these! They are a pretty good quality and have not broken or cracked. They look nice with any decor and come with labels should you want to use them even though the containers are clear.This is my second purchase. I use them for cotton balls, rounds, q tips, contact lenses, disposable eyelashes brushes, lipsticks ..everything fits and helps my vanity look neat and organizedMe funciona super bien y por su transparencia lo puedo colocar en cualquier habitación. La diferencia de tamaños hace que decoren el espacio. Lo uso para exactamente lo que muestra la fotoGood jars for q-tips, cotton, tooth picks, hair pins and more. I like the way they look and good price.
reviews_1s: Product is $8 for cramped plastic containers that DO NOT come with the interior things like cotton swabs/cotton balls/ tooth floss picks. If you go to Marshall’s /Rosa stores they provide you with the glass or plastic containers already with the interior things for the same price. I thought it would be easy to buy this via Amazon, but it was misleading because the images don’t say “containers ONLY”.Did not meet my bathroom storage needs. Looked and felt cheap. Felt these belonged in a pretend bathroom in a playhouse rather than for real world use.Misleading wording of item description and image on cover made me purchase thinking there would be four containers The package came with 4 pieces (2 containers, 2 lids) although the image shows otherwise these containers are a good size and look ok.would not recommendBuyer beware. This is not a set of containers. It is overpriced. I ordered 2 thinking that I was getting two sets. Misleading description.These are very cheap thin plastic. Has lines from the molds that do not show in the pictures. Also has a sharp point on top of the lids from the injection point that can scratch you. Returned.They looked like toys. Too small to compliment any bathroom counter top. Don't waste your money.They’re very small.. I don’t feel like the price was worth itNot sure who would even be able to use these containers they are so small & way to cheaply made.All those 4 are same size.
